name: Educational Bus Transportation
officers: Corr family (founders); Sean Corr (President of EBT subsidiary)
entity_status: Active (operating subsidiary of The Trans Group)
registry_source: NY DOS Division of Corporations (not directly verified); company-history sources (Trans Group, STN, Leonard Bus Sales)
notes: Input address (222 Hudson St, Copiague) is operational/yard address; SAFER lists physical address as 63 Lamar St, West Babylon, NY (corporate). Founded 1962 by the Corr family as the first Trans Group company; subsidiary of The Trans Group LLC. NY DOS entity ID was not directly retrieved via search; would require direct dos.ny.gov entity search. Fleet ~861 power units per SAFER (consistent with Trans Group group total ~1,300).

name: Krapf School Bus
inc_date: 1942 (founded; specific PA DOS entity formation date not directly retrieved)
registry_source: PA Department of State Bureau of Corporations (file.dos.pa.gov) - not directly verified via search
notes: Legal name on SAFER is KRAPF SCHOOL BUS-GKJ INC. Family-owned since 1942 by George Krapf Jr.; HQ West Chester, PA; operates ~2,500 buses across PA/DE/NJ/NY group-wide (multiple USDOT-registered entities). 152 inspections, 41 crashes (0 fatal) over trailing 24 months. PA DOS entity ID not directly retrieved.

name: Advanced Transportation
registry_source: Delaware Division of Corporations (corp.delaware.gov) - not directly verified via search
notes: Legal name in SAFER is ADVANCED STUDENT TRANSPORTATION INC. Subsidiary of Krapf Group (krapfbus.com confirms 5093 Summit Bridge Rd, Middletown, DE 19709 as one of their offices). Input address (5093 Summit Bridge Rd, Middletown DE) matches Krapf's Middletown DE location; SAFER lists corporate address as 1400 First State Blvd, Wilmington DE. DE incorporation date and officer names not directly retrievable via free SOS web search (DE charges for entity detail).

name: D & E Transportation
inc_date: 2010 (per Manta business directory; not directly verified on GA SOS)
registry_source: GA Secretary of State ecorp.sos.ga.gov - not directly verified
notes: No confident FMCSA SAFER match for 'D & E Transportation' at 3166 Dogwood Dr, Atlanta GA 30354. SAFER name search returned only D & E TRANSPORTATION in Portland OR (USDOT 3695091) and a separate D & E in Manteca CA (USDOT 2958856); neither matches Atlanta location. Third-party directory (Manta) lists D&E Transportation at 3166 Dogwood Dr Atlanta with phone (404) 343-0934, classified under Car Rental Transportation Services, reported founded 2010 with ~10-19 employees and $500K-$1M revenue. May not be a USDOT-registered school bus carrier; likely intrastate/small carrier without FMCSA registration. GA SOS direct entity lookup needed for confirmation.

name: Layla Transportation
carrier_operation: Intrastate; private (non-hazmat); NOT AUTHORIZED for interstate for-hire
fmcsa_status: Active USDOT; NOT AUTHORIZED for interstate for-hire
inc_date: 2001 (per company website; NJ DOR registration date not directly verified)
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue and Enterprise Services (njportal.com) - not directly verified
notes: Legal name LAYLA TRANSPORTATION AND TRADING INC, DBA LAYLA TRANSPORTATION. Input address (300 Lincoln Blvd, Middlesex NJ) is one of multiple operating locations; company website lists 930 Lincoln Blvd, Middlesex NJ 08846 and SAFER lists 33 Clawson St, Piscataway NJ 08854 as physical/corporate address. Company website states founded 2001, started with one minivan, grown to operate 200+ school vehicles. SAFER reports only 1 power unit and 1 driver which significantly understates the real fleet of ~200+ vehicles, suggesting most vehicles are intrastate-only and not reported to FMCSA, or the registration is stale.
